reviews.review_description: My favorite to play when I can’t sleep. Its mechanics are familiar and the loose gaming style makes this perfect for sleepy, or otherwise impaired, playing. The visuals are trippy, great colors, and make this an enjoyable and cozy game. Try it! Why not?!

What a nice little game, very refreshing to have something completely unique and different, stumbled across this while searching for a new game and found that it was free! Only idiots complain about receiving something for free. I love the trippy visuals however when I eat the devil mushroom it really does feel like a bad trip. 🤣

developer_response.body:
hahaha Thank you so much :))

We will work on more features - and all thanks to reviews like yours that fuel us

reviews.review_description:
This is too much like Medieval Settlement. It stressed me out and not sure what to do in this game.

*I'm sorry I give honest reviews, I gave it another star.*

developer_response.body:
Hello Lynn!
We understand :( That the game is not your type.
But we give the game that took us two years to develop - for everyone - for free to play around. And your rating just made us drop from 4.9 to 4.6 :(
Some people love the game - as they love the eerie - horror style games (which we state in age rating 18+ and screenshots very clearly)
We would be grateful if you could support us - not make our dreams harder to achieve. Leaving a positive review - or none review at all (If this just isn't your type of game) 90% of the rest of reviews are 5/5 :(

reviews.review_description: Test release so some little quirks for sure but a high quality offering and cant wait to see where it goes!!
